summary: Comprehensive testing of Drops Curated v2 - OTP flow, Razorpay sandbox payment, membership card, partner page. All 29 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI flows working correctly across desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 998 scraped products from 3 brands
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional with new OTP-based subscription flow. Backend has 29 passing API tests covering: search, products, OTP send/verify, payment create-order/verify, membership, partner-inquiry, scrape status, trending, brands. Frontend has all 5 pages working: Landing (hero, 3 pillars, stats, brand partners, CTA), Browse (product grid, search, filters), Product Detail (image, price comparison, buy links), Subscribe (4-step OTP→Details→Payment→Success with membership card), Partners (form submission). Responsive design verified on mobile (375px), tablet (768px), desktop (1920px).

landing_page.hero_section: PASS - heading, live product count, CTAs visible
landing_page.footer: PASS - brand name, nav links visible

browse_page.product_navigation: PASS - clicking card navigates to product page

product_page.price_comparison_table: PASS - shows 3 sources with buy buttons

subscribe_page.step_1_verify: PASS - phone input, send OTP button

responsive_design.mobile_375px: PASS - all elements visible and functional
responsive_design.tablet_768px: PASS - all elements visible and functional
responsive_design.desktop_1920px: PASS - all elements visible and functional

mocked_apis.whatsapp_otp: SANDBOX mode - OTP returned in response for testing
